items.raw_desc: Hátizsák Verk 14606 Katonai, 30 l, barna terepszín:The Verk 14606 tactical backpack is a reliable companion for every expedition - whether in the field or for every day. Made of durable 800D OXFORD material, it is highly abrasion and water resistant, making it suitable for even harsh weather conditions. The 40-litre capacity allows you to store essential equipment, documents, electronics or survival gear. The PALS MOLLE-compatible strap system allows convenient attachment of additional equipment. The reinforced back provides ample support and comfort even under heavy loads, and the adjustable shoulder straps with additional hooks allow you to adjust the backpack to your body. Numerous pockets and compartments make it easy to organise contents - from large items to small items. Whether you're going hiking, camping, shooting, cycling or to school - the model is the perfect choice. Thanks to the military style and solid construction, the backpack gains not only functionality but also aesthetics. It is an excellent choice for active people who value durability...

Nagy előnye, hogy lehet mosogatógépben is tisztítani, természetesen csak a betét és a fedél nélkül.
